description_long: This bungalow features a combination of a main rectangular structure and an attached octagonal section, both topped with red gable roofs. The exterior walls are finished in a light beige color, with multiple windows distributed across the facades, providing ample natural light. The octagonal section appears to serve as a sunroom or enclosed porch, with large windows wrapping around its perimeter. The main entrance is sheltered by a small overhang, and there is a visible staircase leading to a secondary entrance or elevated platform. The rooflines are varied, with the main building having a traditional gable roof and the octagonal section featuring a multi-faceted roof. The property sits on a grassy plot, typical of suburban or residential neighborhoods.
description: A beige bungalow with red gable roofs, an attached octagonal sunroom, and multiple windows, set on a grassy lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, octagonal sunroom with large windows, and the full width of the bungalow.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the staircase, secondary entrance, and the depth of the octagonal section.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional windows, and the connection between the main structure and the sunroom.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the gable end of the main building and the rear of the octagonal section.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and wraparound windows on the sunroom
